_comment: Printed-arithmetic computed fields consumed by maine_forms_engine.computations. Every formula_text is the instruction printed verbatim on the blank (tests/test_computations.py re-checks this against the fetched PDF). Warnings-only: a supplied value is always written as-is. Deliberately NOT declared: line 9c (its 'amount from table (b)' input is unmapped on this form), line 10's Total (the per-child insurance amounts are unmapped), line 13 (conditional: 'Add lines 9c, 10, 11 and 12; if biweekly, multiply x 2'), and lines 14a/14b obligations (line 8b is unmapped and the line-8 shares are statutory percentage entries).

facts.child_care_total.note: the printed Total at the foot of the '11. Weekly child care expenses' Name & amount-per-child-per-week column

facts.medical_expense_total.note: the printed Total at the foot of the '12. Extraordinary medical expenses' Name & amount-per-child-per-week column

facts.parent1_pays_as_support.formula_text: Non-Primary Care Provider Adjustments (Amounts paid directly by Parent 1) Weekly health insurance (line 10) - $ Weekly child care (line 11) - $ Extraordinary Medical Expenses (line 12) - $ Parent 1 pays as support = $
facts.parent1_pays_as_support.note: line 14a: the printed '-' adjustments subtract from Parent 1's support obligation down to the printed '=' result

facts.parent2_pays_as_support.formula_text: Non-Primary Care Provider Adjustments (Amounts paid directly by Parent 2) Weekly health insurance (line 10) - $ Weekly child care (line 11) - $ Extraordinary Medical Expenses (line 12) - $ Parent 2 pays as support = $
facts.parent2_pays_as_support.note: line 14b: the printed '-' adjustments subtract from Parent 2's support obligation down to the printed '=' result
